name: Zeledoniidae
description: Zeledoniidae is a monotypic family of passerine bird endemic to the highlands of Costa Rica and western Panama. The single species is a secretive, wren-like bird that inhabits dense undergrowth in montane forests.

children.name: Zeledonia
children.description: A monotypic genus of small, dark, wren-like bird endemic to the Talamancan montane forests.
